item_text: this diagram models two classes: "puntina della mappa" and "suggerimento". the "puntina della mappa" class contains attributes for geographical coordinates, air quality, temperature, weather status, humidity, wind speed, pressure, and a category indicating environmental conditions. it also has methods to set and get these attributes. the "suggerimento" class includes attributes for title, text, image, and a category, along with methods to set and get these attributes. there is an association between the two classes indicated by "n" on both sides, suggesting a many-to-many relationship.
